Grand Sable Dunes along Pictured Rock National Lakeshore reaches 300 feet above Lake Superior and covers five square miles. In the past Michigan loggers rolled logs down a wooden chute located here to Lake Superior below.

Observers say moves by administration could limit summer services at national forests & lakeshores like Sleeping Bear, which typically hires between 100 & 125 seasonal workers for a park that attracts more than 1 million visitors to the Lake Michigan beach www.bridgemi.com/michigan-gov...

A7) Sleeping Bear Dunes isn’t the closest but it’s a favorite! It’s absolutely beautiful, although even after a long hot hike through the dunes, the Lake Michigan water is still awfully cold. My kids ran into the water and then ran straight back out 😂 #parkchat

This graphic appeared in my Facebook memories today. It was created from a selfie for the Empire Bears' little attempt at a bear run, "Lake Ontario Bear Rendezvous," on March 7, 2004. The event was held the weekend of October 2-3 that year in Rochester, NY. #bearrun
Sleeping Bear Dunes in the shore of #LakeMichigan. Circa 2013. #travel #adventure #photography #blueskyartshow
Bidding goodbye to the day. [Sleeping Bear Dunes, Lake Michigan. Photograph by amazing local photographer Donna Pendergast, DoPe Photography]
Lake Michigan from several spots around Sleeping Bear Dunes National Lakeshore.
The turquoise and aquamarine waters of Lake Michigan at Sleeping Bear Dunes as seen from Pyramid Point, 500 feet above the water. #Michigan #MI
If you see this, quote post with your own beach photo. Sleeping Bear Point, Lake Michigan
Storm coming in on Lake Michigan at Sleeping Bear Dunes in Empire, Michigan.
Impromptu day trip to Sleeping Bear Dunes National Lakeshore yesterday when we finished work early (that is Lake Michigan)
People hiking down Sleeping Bear Dunes to Lake Michigan and getting stuck. The Adirondacks and winter hiking get a few people now and then, too. The East can sneak up on people.
Highly recommend Sleeping Bear Dunes National Lakeshore. it’s beautiful out here ❤️
Today’s adventure was a trip to Sleeping Bear Dunes. That’s a pic of Lake Michigan in the background. I did make it to the top of the climbing dune and was so proud of myself.

Back from a long weekend at Sleeping Bear Dunes! Spectacular lodging at Sleeping Bear Inn in historic Glen Haven Village. And incredible views of Lake Michigan atop the dune at Pierce Stocking Drive. #sleepingbeardune

I’m new here so I’m not sure what to post, but here’s another pic of the Sleeping Bear Dunes that I would hate to sleep in my camera roll. That’s Lake Michigan after a hike. 🥾🏜️🌊✋🏻 #lakemichigan #nationalparks #summer #love #life #Vacation

A2: I grew up with the Sleeping Bear Dunes National Lakeshore in my backyard. I still am taken aback by the view of Lake Michigan from the top of the dunes. I’ve felt the same way in the Badlands, Black Canyon of the Gunnison, and Isle Royale. #ParkChat
Lake Michigan? He on the dunes! Watch out for bears sleeping! #FFXIV #Fatcatventures #ff14 #ファットキャット #ファイナルファンタジーXIV
Lake Michigan with Sleeping Bear Point at left and South Manitou Island at right.
Beautiful! We have the Sleeping Bear Dunes here in Michigan, which are on Lake Michigan.

This is why public land like Sleeping Bear Dunes National Lakeshore and state parks are so important. Only the obscenely wealthy can afford Lake Michigan lakefront now, and they're increasingly walling it off, or "armoring" it, as this story calls it. bridgemi.com/michigan-env...
A11. It's my understanding that much of the Great Lakes region was carved by glaciers, including many features of Sleeping Bear Dunes National Lakeshore. #parkchat www.nps.gov/slbe/learn/n...
Sleeping Bear Point stretching into Lake Michigan on this rainy day.

Sleeping Bear is indeed beautiful. Take it you’ve seen Petoskey, Charlevoix, Harbor Springs area? My 3 faves. Went to South Haven and Saugatuck this fall beautiful water and Saugatuck was an adorable town. I doubt many people know how VAST and beautiful is Lake Michigan 🥰

Scenic views of Glen Lake, Sleeping Bear Dunes, and Lake Michigan just a short hike from our front door. Being near the edge of a national park has its perks!

The Legend of Sleeping Bear is a beautifully sad Indigenous tale about a mother bear who, fleeing a forest fire with her two cubs, tries to swim across Lake Michigan.

Even with the addition of Indiana Dunes the Great Lakes are criminally underrepresented. Sleeping Bear Dunes and Pictured Rocks could and perhaps should be full-fledged national parks.
I like that tale a lot. Reminds of one I heard about sleeping bear dunes (with two islands) in Lake Michigan. I'd type more but I'm got something in my eye. www.nps.gov/slbe/learn/k...
On the shores of Lake Michigan at Sleeping Bear National Park.

Oof. I've never actually been to Sleeping Bear but have been at some of the dunes up north on Lake Superior and there are similar warnings prominently posted. "Don't do it. Don't be stupid. If you do it, don't say we didn't warn you! You will recieve a bill for the helicopter" or whatever.
Exploring Traverse City area and Sleeping Bear Dunes, what do I need to see? Here for 72 hours…dog friend is a plus! #traversecity #puremichigan #greatlakes #snow

Currently in the upper 40s and lower 50s near Sleeping Bear Dunes. I took this photo on November 10th, 2018 (Edmund Fitzgerald Memorial Day) at Sleeping Bear Point. Different weather vibes that year. #Michigan #NaturePhotography #LakeMichigan

Gotcha... I forget that people could be in EU ;-) If you do enjoy vacations to dunes. Most of the Michigan side of Lake Michigan is dunes, and then there are the Sleeping Bear Dunes. One of my favorite places en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sleepin...
Trip pic dump: first up, Lake Michigan from Sleeping Bear Dunes. Enjoyed exploring the trails, tho I spent most of the first morning battened down in a thunderstorm.

Sleeping Bear Dunes National Lakeshore - October 2023 This was such a fun weekend/trip and the weather was amazing with a low pressure system / cold front bringing lake effect showers creating such a photogenic sunset

Trump admin could limit summer services at national forests & lakeshores like Sleeping Bear, which typically hires between 100/125 seasonal workers for park that attracts more than 1 million visitors to the Lake Michigan beach--a 25% funding loss starting this spring www.bridgemi.com/michigan-gov...
Mighty Lake Michigan- Sleeping Bear Dunes July 2025 #nationallakeshore
Sleeping Bear Dunes (about a 3/5 hour drive NW of where I am) are over 400 feet high in some cases. This is pro level sledding, and if you go down the wrong side, the next stop is Lake Michigan.
Lake Michigan today, just south of Sleeping Bear Dunes.

If you did some research, you'd know this is from June 2016 at Sleeping Bear Dunes West of Traverse City on Lake Michigan. It's very real. No where in the original post does it claim this was filmed today. 😐
Head over to Sleeping Bear Dunes on Lake Michigan!
From Grand Marais, Minnesota near Lake Superior. These are black bear cubs.

I'm going to Sleeping Bear Dunes today ! I'll post a few pictures. I visited lake Superior last week and drove on the bridge between Michigan and Huron last weekend. I still struggle realising their size, my whole country is smaller than them 😂

The Bear Tree is by Raymond Gormley, and was given to the City of Grand Marais in 1953 in appreciation of their support for the art colony there. The sculpture is a popular feature of Grand Marais Harbor on Lake Superior.
Looking north #LakeMichigan #PureMichigan Sleeping Bear Dunes National Park

"Flip-flops come in handy on this inland shore vacation of Warren Dunes while a wild stretch of Michigan shoreline delivers the ultimate Great Lakes escape at Sleeping Bear Dunes and Isle Royale proves just how magical true wilderness can be."

Sleeping Bear Dunes National Lakeshore was established to protect one of the most breathtaking landscapes on the Great Lakes. Shaped by glaciers & sculpted by wind, its towering dunes, forests, and beaches remind us of nature’s quiet power & beauty Sleeping Bear Dunes Poster: bit.ly/sleeping-bea...
What part of Lake Michigan are you near? I spend a lot of time in the Sleeping Bear Dunes area. Part of my family is from there. Its one of my favorite places.
Lake Michigan sunset at Sleeping Bear Dunes. My favorite way to spend a summer evening.

The cover photo is from the 2023 Sleeping Bear half marathon. Lake Michigan was wild that day. I was pretty excited how well it went for the most middle-aged reason: I was having recurrent gall bladder attacks and that SOB was removed eight days later.

The Sleeping Bear Heritage Trail passes through diverse landscapes, including forests, meadows, and dunes, offering beautiful views of Lake Michigan along the way. adventuresinnorthernmichigan.com/sleeping-bea... #sleepingbeardune #sleepingbeartrails #sleepingbearheritagetrail

Motel Bear Lake in Bear Lake, Michigan is an adorable women-led lakeside inn with strong community spirit, local art, and playful vintage flair.
Located near Sleeping Bear Dunes on Lake Michigan, Port Oneida is an underrated beauty that has been abandoned since 1908. It was once a lumber town.

Those aren’t smiles but grimaces after the NP Ranger recommended hike of 1.5 m to Lake Michigan was mostly soul-crushing, thigh-high fine sand. And uphill both ways. Sleeping Bear Dunes in the distance on the left.

Sleeping Bear Dunes: Michigan's Giant Sand Mystery Explained Sleeping Bear Dunes rise up to 450 feet (137 meters) above Lake Michigan, making them among the tallest freshwater dunes on Earth. The dunes were formed by glacial activit... #GlacialGeology #GreatLakes #MichiganNature #Nature #Science
Finally listed! If anybody is looking for a Vacation Rental in the Sleeping Bear Dunes National Lakeshore area, take a look at The Northern Nook. #glenlake #glenarbor #michigan #lakemichigan #rental
